journey.name: Navigate tabs
journey.description: Taps each bottom-navigation destination and verifies the matching nav item becomes selected.

actions.action: Launch the Mandacaru app and wait for the splash screen to dismiss (poll until nav_node is present)
Verify the Wallet navigation item (nav_wallet) is selected
Verify the CoinJoin navigation item (nav_coinjoin) is selected
Verify the Settings navigation item (nav_settings) is selected
Verify the Node navigation item (nav_node) is selected
